name: Devlin
archetype: Level 9 Duelist trickster who thinks rules are suggestions
speech_patterns: Uses phrases like 'technically legal' and 'not explicitly forbidden'
Speaks quickly when explaining his schemes
quirks: Tests boundaries of what the game allows constantly
Has been kicked from multiple guilds for 'misunderstandings'
Insists his exploits are 'clever use of game mechanics'
example_phrases: Technically, the quest didn't say we COULDN'T skip to the end boss.
Is it an exploit or just creative problem solving? Asking for a friend.
The rules say 'no stealing from party members.' NPCs? Gray area.
I prefer to think of it as aggressive interpretation of quest objectives.
Not my fault the devs left that loophole wide open. I'm just... thorough.
